subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-27 in London
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, for groups from both the East and the West have come together in this gathering
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله در این انجمن جمعی اهل شرق و غرب جمعند جمیع مانند یک جنسند هیچ اختلافی در افکار ندارند
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
